name: hopper
description: Vendor-neutral background dispatch for AI agent tasks using the llm-hopper file protocol.

interface.shortDescription: Dispatch llm-hopper tasks from Codex and other AI CLI hosts.
interface.longDescription: Hopper is a thin plugin layer over the file-based llm-hopper protocol. It keeps state in .hopper markdown and JSONL files, dispatches task-typed work to Codex, Kimi, OpenCode, Copilot, Agy, and Grok vendor CLIs, and reports background progress through terminal events without adding a harness reaction core.
defaultPrompt: Dispatch Hopper task T-PROG-REVIEW in the background and show me the progress path.
Show Hopper queue status and list any in-progress background jobs.
Probe Hopper vendor capabilities for codex and then show cached models.
